MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Karlie Schafer, Esq. 800-506-2652 of the Moore Law Group for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

PETITIONER FORWARD FINANCING, LLC's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm contractual arbitration award" is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
